'''Pirralor''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Pirralor system/Legends|Pirralor system]] of the [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]], in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[House Pilor]], and its [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]] were thick with outsiders from the [[Ninth Quadrant]] and the [[Agarix sector/Legends|Agarix sector]].<ref name="TEA" /> [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dor Reder]] hailed from Pirralor.<ref name="WBC">[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']]</ref>
